customAttributes.description:
As long as you've visited an Attraction this turn, Soul Swindler has indestructible. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
When Soul Swindler enters the batlefield, open an Attraction. (Put the top card of your Attraction deck onto the battlefield.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Three tries to decide your fate! Fabulous prizes! Probably no untold torment!"
